---
title: "Ruben Jimenez"
about:
  template: solana
  image: IMG_9150.jpg
  links:
    - href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rjimenezanalytics/
      icon: "linkedin"
    - href: https://github.com/rjimenezdata
      icon: "github"
    - href: mailto:rjimenezanalytics@outlook.com
      icon: "envelope-fill"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---
## Education

**California Polytechnic State University** | San Luis Obispo, CA

B.S. Statistics | Sept. 2021 - June 2025

  - Minor in Actuarial Preparation
  - Societies & Awards: DataFest 2025 Best Visualization Winner, Stat Club Co-President

M.S. Statistics | Sept. 2025 - June 2026

## Experience

**Cal Poly Catering** | Catering Assistant | Sept. 2022 - May 2026

**Cal Poly Experience Industry Management Department** | Research Assistant | Dec. 2024 - Feb. 2025

**Cal Poly Statistics Department** | Instructional Student Assistant | Dec. 2023 - Dec. 2024
